subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones! Hearken unto My call and then aid Me through wisdom and utterance. Thus have ye been commanded in the Tablets [3.5s]... ...My God, my God! I testify that Thine evidence hath encompassed all things, Thy guidance and testimony have been revealed
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اولیائی اسمعوا ندائی ثم انصرونی بالحکمه و البیان هذا ما امرتم به فی الواح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
